displayTitle: R2-D2 and BB-8's Super Snowy Shenanigans
synopsis: R2-D2 and BB-8 review some classified Resistance files and an enemy droid steals them out of nowhere and speeds off down the snowy slopes! R2-D2 and BB-8 race after him to take back what’s theirs! Can they catch him before he gets away with their secrets?
title: R2-D2 and BB-8's Super Snowy Shenanigans
